heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 933 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section, , , related to powers of Secretary of War to permit extension of roads across military reservations, landing of ferries, erection of bridges, and driving of livestock. See sections 4777 and 9777 of Title 10, Armed Forces.act July 5, 1884, ch. 214, § 623 Stat. 104
